name: agentry
description: Agentry skill for agent-native analytics, error logging, and deploy attribution over the Agentry HTTP API.

interface.shortDescription: Analytics, error logging, and deploy attribution for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Agentry gives AI coding agents one HTTP API for product analytics, error logging, and deploy attribution. Use it when an agent needs to install telemetry, verify signal coverage, debug production cases, answer product analytics questions, or connect regressions to deploys from live data.
